landing.title: Calculate your software project budget
landing.subtitle: 42 smart questions that adapt to your project. Get a complexity estimate, investment range, and timeline.
landing.featureTreeDesc: 42 adaptive questions that automatically adjust to your project type, revealing the real complexity.
landing.featureInstantDesc: Detailed result with investment range, timeline, and complexity level generated in seconds.
landing.featureMultilingualDesc: Full support for PT, EN, ES, and IT with values in BRL, USD, and EUR.
landing.testimonial1Quote: I saved hours of spreadsheets and alignment meetings. Now I arrive at conversations with the numbers already structured.
landing.testimonial2Quote: I use it to give quick estimates to clients before closing a proposal. Professional and objective.
landing.testimonial3Quote: The 42 questions cover everything I need to qualify a project. An indispensable tool.

errors.notFoundMessage: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.
